events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "high",
  "work_stage": "rough-complete",
  "component_conditions": ["installed-defective", "non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 80,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0,
  "rate": 0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Damper positions do not match the approved TAB report settings at rough-complete stage.",
    "Observed damper blade angles or stroke settings deviate from the balanced/commissioned positions."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Lock down all dampers to the positions specified in the TAB balance report.",
    "Re-verify actual airflow readings against the TAB report after repositioning dampers.",
    "Notify the balancing contractor and general contractor of the non-compliance."
  ],
  "rationale": "Measurable mismatch between field damper positions and TAB balance report indicates the system is not left in its balanced state. SMACNA and standard TAB procedures require that all final damper positions be locked and match the balance report before ceiling/access closures. Failure to do so compromises airflow delivery, system performance, and energy efficiency, violating the submittals and contract documents. Work cannot progress to closure until corrected.",
  "references": [
    "SMACNA HVAC Duct Construction Standards (damper installation and marking)",
    "SMACNA HVAC Systems Testing, Adjusting and Balancing (TAB report post-balancing requirements)",
    "Associated Air Balance Council (AABC) National Standards / NEBB Procedural Standards (damper lockdown and verification)"
  ]
}
